flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at North Georgia Technical College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (65.4% → 58.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at North Georgia Technical College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.0k → $3.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 10 pp at North Georgia Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (36.7% vs 46.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at North Georgia Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.3% → 0.0%).
